call_inputs.name: registration_data
call_inputs.description: JSON object containing patient registration details (name, contact, etc.)

call_outputs.name: registration_result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status (boolean), patient ID (string), and message (string)

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Check for uniqueness and create new patient record

call_inputs.name: booking_data
call_inputs.description: JSON object containing patient ID, date, time, doctor, etc.

call_outputs.name: booking_result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status (boolean), appointment ID (string), and message (string)

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Check slot availability and create new appointment

call_outputs.name: records_result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status (boolean), list of records (array), and message (string)

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Retrieve all records for the patient

call_inputs.name: update_data
call_inputs.description: JSON object containing patient ID and fields to update

call_outputs.name: update_result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status (boolean) and message (string)

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Verify patient exists and update profile fields

call_outputs.name: data
call_outputs.description: Remaining JSON data after removing command field

call_inputs.name: validation_input
call_inputs.description: JSON object containing command and data to validate

call_outputs.name: validation_result
call_outputs.description: JSON with valid (boolean) and error (string, optional)

call_inputs.name: result
call_inputs.description: Result from a child operation containing success, data, message
